settings.heading: Universal storage rule
settings.content: Store products in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight, heat and moisture. Seal tightly after every use.

settings.heading: Dry fruits
settings.content:
• Keep sealed and dry.
  • Use clean, dry hands or utensils.
  • Refrigerate after opening in hot or humid weather if needed.
  • Avoid moisture exposure because it can affect texture and freshness.

settings.heading: Nuts
settings.content:
• Keep in an airtight container after opening.
  • Store away from heat and sunlight.
  • Refrigerate for longer freshness in hot weather.
  • Avoid if allergic to tree nuts.

settings.heading: Seeds and grains
settings.content:
• Keep sealed in a dry place.
  • Avoid humidity.
  • Use clean spoons to prevent moisture transfer.
  • Fiber-rich seeds should be used in sensible portions with adequate water.

settings.heading: Herbs and botanicals
settings.content:
• Keep away from moisture, sunlight and strong odors.
  • Do not leave packets open.
  • Use with professional guidance if pregnant, nursing, medicated or managing a health condition.

settings.heading: Natural sweeteners
settings.content:
• Keep tightly sealed.
  • Protect from ants, moisture and heat.
  • Natural sweeteners are still sweet foods; use according to dietary needs.

settings.heading: Signs to check before use
settings.content: Do not use if the product has an unusual smell, visible mold, heavy moisture damage or damaged packaging.

settings.heading: Morganics Storage Guide
settings.intro: Natural pantry products stay better when stored correctly. Use this guide to protect freshness, aroma, texture and quality after opening.
settings.cta_text: Message us with the product name, desired quantity and your city. Our team will guide you with availability and next steps.
